action_text: Press Escape while focused on the global search to close the search context popover
rationale: The “Choose search context” popover is blocking interactions with the list (e.g., the filter icon). Dismissing it will let me use the list filter to find the report.

action_text: Click the Show/Hide filter icon on the reports list
rationale: Once the popover is closed, enabling the list filter is the most direct way to search by Title for the desired report.

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort the reports by title
rationale: Sorting by Title can help quickly locate a report named like “Incidents by agent” if the list isn’t too long, without leaving the page.

action_text: Click the global search (magnifier) button to toggle/close the search context popover
rationale: If Escape doesn’t close the popover, toggling the global search icon should dismiss it so I can interact with the list controls.

action_text: Scroll down the page to see more reports in the list
rationale: If the report is already in the list but off-screen, scrolling the page will reveal more rows to locate it.
